title: Gentle Silky Chinese Noodles Chow Fun
description: A resinous and silky Chinese dish from Yunnan, featuring oil and clay-pot cooking, perfect for a lazy Sunday. This satvik-friendly recipe is made with chow fun noodles.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a clay pot over medium heat.
Add the sliced ginger and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute until fragrant.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook for 2 minutes until they release their moisture.
Add the chopped scallions and cook for 1 minute until they are slightly wilted.
Add the chow fun noodles and stir to combine with the mushroom mixture.
Add the soy sauce, sesame oil, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes until the noodles are well coated with the sauce.
Remove the clay pot from the heat and let it cool for a few minutes.
Serve the Gentle Silky Chinese Noodles Chow Fun hot, garnished with additional scallions if desired.
